hooks.name: maestro-session-start
hooks.description: Initialize Maestro workspace and generate permissions manifest

hooks.name: maestro-tool-selection
hooks.description: UX optimization: suggest available tools based on active agent (NOT a security boundary)

hooks.name: maestro-before-tool
hooks.description: PRIMARY enforcement: blocks unauthorized tool calls per agent permissions

hooks.name: maestro-before-agent
hooks.description: Track active agent and inject dynamic context

hooks.name: maestro-after-agent
hooks.description: Validate handoff report and clear active agent tracking
